fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 70 incorrectly identifies a shared last element as a duplicate to be removed, leading to data loss on line 71.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: A shared last element should not be considered a special case for removal.
The total number of elements must be preserved even if the last element is shared.
When not removing elements, the list length must be the sum of input lengths.
The final merged list must contain all elements from both input lists.
